## Why

## Docs

<!--
Every PR updates relevant docs. List the docs/** files this PR touches.
If the PR genuinely has no docs impact (typo, internal refactor with no
behavior change, dependency bump, etc.), apply the `docs:not-applicable`
label and note WHY here.

For bug fixes specifically:
-->

- [ ] **Bug-fix PRs**: I have grepped `docs/` for the affected symbol/behavior and confirmed the docs are consistent (or updated them in this PR).
- [ ] Docs files updated: `docs/...` (list them)
- [ ] OR: `docs:not-applicable` label applied because: <!-- reason -->
